_comment: Degraded-run fixture (F-001): the DLP policy read was denied (the role used for this run cannot enumerate DLP compliance policies). Every DLP check derives from Get-DlpCompliancePolicy, so the section degrades to a single 'not readable this session' (Verify manually) finding, never a fabricated 'No DLP policies'.

policies.error: Access to run 'Get-DlpCompliancePolicy' was denied for the current role.

rules.error: Access to run 'Get-DlpComplianceRule' was denied for the current role.
